description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat, slightly sloped roof and a striking black-and-white striped exterior. The front facade includes a large glass sliding door and a single open entry door, both set above a small step. The side walls are mostly solid, with one small horizontal window visible on the left side. The building sits on a rectangular base with a green and black patterned ground, suggesting a stylized lawn or patio area. The rear of the bungalow is simple, with horizontal striping and no visible windows or doors. The overall appearance is minimalist and contemporary, with clean lines and bold contrasts.
description: A modern, boxy bungalow with black-and-white stripes, a flat sloped roof, and large glass doors on the front. Minimalist design with a small side window and patterned green base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass sliding door, open entry door, and striped facade above a small step.
description_view_1: Left side view with a small horizontal window and mostly solid black wall, plus a glimpse of the open door.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying horizontal black-and-white stripes and no visible windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view with a solid black wall and partial view of the open entry door.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front glass door and single small side window
